name: Peptides
description: Short chains of amino acids that serve as building blocks for proteins like collagen.
scientificSummary: Signaling mechanisms tell the skin to produce more collagen and elastin.
mechanismOfAction: Signaling mechanisms tell the skin to produce more collagen and elastin.
